reviews.comment:
Utillicé solo el bar. Excelentes la cajera y la moza!  Tengo dificultades y nos atendieron por demás de bien . Domingo  13  febrero a las 1530 hs!

(Translated by Google)
I only used the bar. The cashier and the waitress were excellent! I have some difficulties and they took exceptional care of us. Sunday, February 13th at 3:30 PM!
